summary: Tested 3 key fixes: (1) Go NearMe stays opening NearMeConciergeModal, (2) Admin Product Box Export CSV returning 50-column CSV, (3) Admin Product Box Import CSV parsing and importing with 'Import Complete' toast. All backend (15/15) and frontend (5/5) tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: NearMeConciergeModal: Clicking 'Book via Concierge® →' on Amadi Beach Front Resort in PetFriendlyStays (Find & Stay tab, /go mobile) opens NearMeConciergeModal with header 'BOOK VIA CONCIERGE · GO', venue name, address, rating, date picker, 'Not sure yet — just enquire' checkbox, notes textarea, and 'Send to Go Concierge →' button. NOT the ServiceBookingModal 4-step flow.

Export CSV: GET /api/product-box/export/csv?include_all_fields=true returns exactly 50 columns (id, sku, name, brand, product_type, primary_pillar, pillars, category, subcategory, mrp, selling_price, ..., breed_metadata, intelligent_tags). File downloads as products_export_{pillar}_{date}.csv. 'Exported!' toast shown. 7529 product rows in current DB.

Import CSV: POST /api/product-box/import accepts flat CSV rows, parses quoted CSV correctly, maps all 50 fields into nested schema. Test with 2 rows returned {success:true, imported:2, updated:0, failed:0, total:2, errors:[]}. 'Import Complete! Imported: 2 new · Updated: 0 existing · Failed: 0' toast shown.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Import_Product_256, TEST_Import_Schema_Check_256, TEST_Full_Import_256, TEST_RoundTrip_256_UNIQUE, TEST_ValidRow_256, TEST_UIImport_Alpha, TEST_UIImport_Beta via import tests. Cleanup fixture removes TEST_ prefixed products after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 fixes in iteration 256 verified: (1) GoMobilePage.jsx line 373-380: PetFriendlyStays.onBook now calls setNearMeConc({open:true,venue}) which opens NearMeConciergeModal — confirmed working with 'BOOK VIA CONCIERGE · GO' header, date+notes fields. (2) NearMeConciergeModal.jsx handleSend passes structured details+note to request() — code reviewed, buildMasterBriefing gets venue/date/notes. (3) Admin UnifiedProductBox Export CSV calls /api/product-box/export/csv?include_all_fields=true — downloads 50-column CSV with 7529 rows. Import CSV uploads CSV file → parses with custom quoted-CSV parser → calls POST /api/product-box/import → shows 'Import Complete!' toast. Backend endpoints at /api/product-box/import (POST) and /api/product-box/export/csv (GET) both fully functional. Backend test file: /app/backend/tests/test_product_box_256.py (15 tests all passing).

detailed_findings.go_nearme_modal: NearMeConciergeModal opens when clicking 'Book via Concierge® →' on stay cards in Find & Stay tab. Header shows 'BOOK VIA CONCIERGE · GO'. Venue name (h2), vicinity (📍), rating (⭐) displayed. Date input (type=date), 'Not sure yet — just enquire' checkbox, notes textarea, 'Send to Go Concierge →' button (data-testid=nearme-concierge-send-btn) all present. NO ServiceBookingModal ('Book Boarding & Stays' 4-step) opened.
detailed_findings.export_csv: data-testid='export-products-btn' present. Click triggers /api/product-box/export/csv?include_all_fields=true backend call. Download: products_export_all_2026-03-31.csv with 50 columns, 7529 rows. 'Exported! Products exported to CSV (all pillars)' toast shown.
detailed_findings.import_csv: Import CSV button triggers hidden file input (accept='.csv'). Upload triggers parseCSVText() then POST /api/product-box/import. Test with 2-row CSV: 'Import Complete! Imported: 2 new · Updated: 0 existing · Failed: 0' toast shown. No import failures.
detailed_findings.backend_export: GET /api/product-box/export/csv?include_all_fields=true: 200 OK, content-type=text/csv, exactly 50 columns confirmed.
detailed_findings.backend_import: POST /api/product-box/import: {success:true, imported:N, updated:N, failed:0, total:N, errors:[]}. Empty list returns total:0. Rows without 'name' skipped (not failed). Round-trip verified: imported product appears in subsequent export.
